description_long: This is a classic steam locomotive with a cylindrical black and brown boiler, a prominent red cowcatcher at the front, and large spoked wheels with red and silver accents. The cab is boxy with a curved red roof and blue-framed rectangular windows, while the smokestack and two domes sit atop the boiler. Brass and gold details accentuate the piping and fixtures, giving it a vintage, industrial look. The front features a large circular faceplate and a headlamp, while the rear is flat with a small window and no visible doors. The train is compact, with only a single carriage visible, and is designed for rail transport. Its overall appearance is colorful and stylized, reminiscent of 19th-century steam engines.
description: A stylized, vintage steam locomotive with a red roof, black and brown body, large red wheels, and brass details. It features a prominent cowcatcher, smokestack, and blue-framed windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the locomotive, including the red roof, blue windows, large spoked wheels, and detailed piping.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular faceplate, smokestack, headlamp, and red cowcatcher.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with visible wheels, domes, and window arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat back of the cab with a small window and no visible doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: two rectangular windows on each side of the cab
